title: Valentine Favorite Hot Fudge Sauce
ingredients: 10 ounces good quality semi-sweet chocolate, chopped
Melt the chocolate in a small bowl, stirring every 30-60 seconds, in the microwave.  When melted, whisk in the cocoa until dissolve, set aside.
instructions: Place the sugar, corn syrup, cream, salt and water in a medium saucepan.  Warm over low heat, without stirring, until the sugar dissolves.  Increase the heat to medium-high; simmer the mixture, stirring frequently, about 4 minutes.
Turn off the heat and whisk in the butter and vanilla.  Cool the mixture slightly, about 2 minutes, then whisk in the melted chocolate.  Serve warm over delicious ice cream.
